concept.headline: Modifiers wrap function logic with reusable checks.
concept.explanation: Use modifiers to centralize repeated guards like ownership checks.

demo.intro: Create and apply an ownership modifier.

explanation.why: Avoid repeating require in each function
explanation.misconception: Modifier code runs before function body unless _ position changed

prediction.question: What does _ do inside a modifier?
prediction.explanation: _ is the insertion point for the modified function body.

explanation.afterDemo: Modifiers make contracts cleaner and reduce copy-paste security mistakes.

practice.prompt: Create modifier nonZero(uint256 x) requiring x>0 and apply it to function set(uint256 x).
practice.hint: Pass function arg into modifier call.

feedback.successMessage: Modifier creation and usage are correct.

summary.title: Modifiers — Complete
takeaways: Great for access and input guards
